name: wiki-markdown
description: Markdown-backed AI-native filesystem wiki management for AI agents.

interface.shortDescription: Manage an AI-native project wiki backed by markdown files.
interface.longDescription: Initializes, reads, writes, retires, and validates a markdown-backed wiki under wiki/ for project SSOTs, runbooks, intents, decisions, rejected alternatives, trial-error records, and observations.
defaultPrompt: Use $wiki to recall the project context before changing code.
Use $wiki to capture this decision and refresh indexes.
